Patch Set 3: tests reporting impacted by the API issue - onap-k8s OK (only error due to internal cert job that should be ignored or better launched in another ns) - healthcheck OK - smoke * basic_cnf KO due to a 500 from the VID 2021-03-02 18:47:21,706 DEBUG 120:onap_service.py(1) - [None][Declare VID resource with basicnf_project name] response: HTTP Status 500 – Internal Server Error

HTTP Status 500 – Internal Server Error

Type Exception Report

Message Servlet.init() for servlet [dispatcher] threw exception

Description The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request.

Exception

javax.servlet.ServletException: Servlet.init() for servlet [dispatcher] threw exception
https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/1067639782/artifacts/download

this error has already been reported to VID and occurs time to time https://jira.onap.org/browse/VID-960?filter=-2
* basic_vm KO due a 500 coming from the SDC on service submission, jira also already created

I think we could give a new try especially for basic_cnf that was OK on last daily master
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_master/03-01-2021_06-03/
